summary.dedupe_basis: canonical platform key plus websiteUrl/submissionUrl uniqueness
summary.safety_posture: public authorized routes only; no login, payment, captcha, upload, email send or form submission attempted

platforms.name: WFMU Freeform Radio Music Director Review Route
platforms.country: United States / New Jersey and New York metropolitan area / freeform radio audience
platforms.manualReviewReason: Physical media preparation, music director review, rights/clean-content checks and non-automated outreach are required.
platforms.verificationNotes: Official WFMU pages show active 2026 station activity, a Send Us Music route and Music Director contact path.

platforms.name: WREK Atlanta 91.1 FM Submit Music Route
platforms.country: United States / Atlanta Georgia / Georgia Tech college-radio audience
platforms.manualReviewReason: Official email/snail-mail route exists, but asset packaging, FCC-clean review and non-automated outreach are required.
platforms.verificationNotes: Official WREK pages show current June 2026 activity and a detailed How To Submit Music route.

platforms.name: WICB 91.7 FM Ithaca Submit Music Route
platforms.country: United States / Ithaca New York / college-radio and local-music audience
platforms.manualReviewReason: Submit Music route is visible, but content is dynamic/SPA and must be manually opened and validated without bypassing site behavior.
platforms.verificationNotes: Official WICB site exposes Submit Music navigation; reference material confirms local/specialty music programming.

platforms.name: WXYC 89.3 FM Chapel Hill Music Department Route
platforms.country: United States / Chapel Hill North Carolina / UNC student-run freeform radio audience
platforms.manualReviewReason: Music Department route exists, but no safe static submission form was identified; package preparation and route confirmation require manual review.
platforms.verificationNotes: Official WXYC site confirms student-run freeform activity, recent 2026 posts and Music Department contact/address details.
